name: Reasonable Cause Exception for Refusal of Entry

eligibility.description: Applies to fuel-related business entities that can show reasonable cause for denying the Secretary entry or inspection actions.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides an exemption from the $1,000 penalty for refusing entry or inspection authorized under section 4083(d)(1) if the refusal is due to reasonable cause.
